This site publishes the Quarto pipeline for a retrospective cohort study examining chronic kidney disease (CKD) outcomes following immune checkpoint inhibitor (ICI) therapy.
The pipeline has two stages:

title: ICI в†’ CKD Cohort Study
text:
Data privacy
Patient-level identifiers (EMPI, MRN, names, dates of birth) never appear in any rendered output. Rendered tables and plots contain only aggregate summaries well above the small-cell threshold; all cell counts shown are institutional-level cohort statistics.
Raw RPDR extracts and clinical Excel files remain local вЂ” only the rendered code and aggregate results are published here.

text:
NoteAbout this page



This page is a summary of the data management pipeline. Code is hidden across the site and chunks are not executed at render time вЂ” they would load RPDR extracts and patient-level data which stay local. The cleaned output (final_master_0114_raw.xlsx + aki_0120.xlsx) is produced locally and feeds analysis.qmd.

title: Kavita ICI CKD вЂ” Data Management
text:
Pipeline overview








Stage
Inputs
Output




1. Demographics & cohort
ICI starts registry + RPDR Dem
Race, Ethnic_Group, sex, last-known-alive date


2. Pre-baseline labs (within 180 days of ICI)
RPDR Lab
pre_CRE_180days, pre_HGB_180days, pre_ALB_180days


3. Baseline eGFR
Pre-baseline CRE + age + sex
eGFR_cre via CKD-EPI 2021 race-free formula


4. Comorbidities & medications on/before ICI
RPDR Dia + Med
dm, htn, cad, cirrhosis, esrd_kt, ppi, ace_arb, diu, steroids, smoking


5. Post-ICI CKD outcomes
Serial CRE after baseline + CKD-EPI
ckd_incidence, ckd_progression, eskd_defination_1 (each with 90-day persistence rule)


6. ESRD / KT after ICI
RPDR Dia (post-ICI date)
esrd_kt_after_ici, esrd_kt_after_ici_date


7. Cohort exclusions

ICI date < 2024-03-31; baseline CRE exists; no pre-existing ESRD/KT; baseline eGFR в‰Ґ 10; no RPDR death-date errors


8. ICI class & companion chemo (В±30 days of ICI)
RPDR Med
ICI_Class (PD1/PDL1/CTLA4/Combination), Bevacizumab, Cisplatin, Carboplatin, Pemetrexed, Gemcitabine, Cetuximab, Trastuzumab, VEGF_TKI, nephrotoxic_chemo


9. AKI from serial CRE
RPDR Lab (post-ICI CRE)
aki, aki_date, aki_days using KDIGO-style rules (CRE > 1.5Г— median-90d OR +0.3 over lowest-2d)


10. Composite outcomes & competing-risk status
All outcomes + death
eskd_composite, ckd_composite, status_ckd_cmp (Censored / CKD / Death), time_to_ckd_cmp


11. Yearly eGFR & CKD stage (1вЂ“10 years)
Yearly median CRE per patient
eGFR_CRE_1yearвЂ¦10year, ckd_stage_1yearвЂ¦10year

title: Kavita ICI CKD вЂ” Data Management
text:
Key method decisions

eGFR formula вЂ” CKD-EPI 2021 race-free creatinine-based equation for all eGFR calculations (baseline, yearly, pre/post-event).
Outcome definitions вЂ” CKD events require the defining condition to hold for в‰Ґ 90 days (persistence rule) before being counted, to exclude transient dips.
AKI вЂ” post-ICI creatinine compared to both a 90-day pre-window median (KDIGO 1.5Г— criterion) and a 2-day pre-window minimum (+0.3 mg/dL criterion).
Competing risk вЂ” death is modeled as a competing event to CKD composite. Patients who die before any CKD event contribute to the Death stratum of status_ckd_cmp.
Pre-index windows вЂ” all baseline covariates (medications, diagnoses, labs) are restricted to dates on or before ICI_Dose_Date to prevent temporal leakage.

FIXED 2026-04-17 вЂ” Temporal leakage bug (flagged by Codex adversarial review). Previous version only applied Medication_Date <= index_date when excluded_names was supplied; the else branch dropped the date guard, so exposures like ppi, ace_arb, and diu could include medications started AFTER ICI. This contaminated вЂњbaselineвЂќ covariates with post-ICI treatment history and biased downstream models. Date filter is now applied in both branches. Any final_master_*.xlsx built from the old version must be regenerated before use.
